feed.title: AO3 - Dick Grayson/Jason Todd (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Dick Grayson/Jason Todd on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: bunny, oh bunny (isn't it funny?)
entry.summary:
Author: thearkhamknightmare

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,833Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 18

Summary: He'd felt so exposed, sitting here like it was a normal day and that he wasn't splayed out on Jason's lap in front of a mirror. There’s a pressure building up, an overwhelm that Dick didn’t really know how or what to do about. He’d never hated the fact that he was so close to getting relief just to have it stopped every time he went to move even the slightest bit.“Jay," Dick gasps, "Jay, c'mon-"“Stop talking,” Jason replies and it’s cold—some might even say it was cruel in its tone—but Dick knows better. He feels Jason, he knows Jason want to do more because every time Dick moves ever so slightly Jason throbs; it’s really just a battle of who would break first. Would it be Dick, the certified brat, or Jason, the certified brat tamer? Nobody really knew and, when you're dealing with two of the most competitive people this side of New Jersey, it was like waiting for a bomb to drop.or: my piece for the Grayson Gets Hooded Bunnywing Special and a scene in my brain from an office inspired AU that I haven't gotten around to writing but wanted this specific scene out of my brain because why the hell not?

entry.title: Hush Little One, You Are Safe Now
entry.summary:
Author: Gaynightwing03

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 84,839Chapters: 30/?Kudos: 1,372

Summary: Damian has tried his best to become the partner that his Father needs, but it seems that his Father does not approve of Robin's style and methods. A night of yelling is enough to set things in motion, were Damain realizes that his Father isn't who he wants to be partners with, but perhaps a certain brother will aid where his Father has not.

entry.title: Batcest Baby #1
entry.summary:
Author: rhaellu

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,358Chapters: 1/4Kudos: 12

Summary: Second trimester of Dick's baby with Bruce.Dick starts to recover from the strain the first trimester put him through, starts seeing the changes on his body and he doesn't know why it makes him feel so strange. Guilt for not being intimate with his partners hurts his relationship but Bruce, Jason, Tim and Damian show him how much they love him regardless.(Tags will be added/edited as I update chapters, reading the previous parts will help you understand their relationship, and this is your DEAD DOVE warning)Enjoy!

entry.title: The Dynamic Duo
entry.summary:
Author: sarriathmg

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 32,457Chapters: 5/34Kudos: 194

Summary: Having been Batman for four years, Dick Grayson still hasn't gotten used to the heaviness of the cowl. Now, investigating a mass disappearance case that happened a few days ago in a late-night diner, Dick meets a young street rat who's had friends tangled up in the same web. Jason Todd has all the traits Dick saw in himself when he first started—curious, shrewd, agile, and, most importantly, wanting to do good. Despite Dick's initial rejection of the boy, he starts to think that a long-term partnership isn't a bad idea. Perhaps four years have been long enough time for the current stasis. Perhaps, he thinks, it's time for his own Robin.

entry.summary:
Author: nursal1060

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,213Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 53

entry.title: The Little Wing Loophole
entry.summary:
Author: kitnotkat95

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,699Chapters: 1/2Kudos: 20

Summary: Dick was not pleased. If you asked him, and really you should in his opinion, Slade was being completely unreasonable. Sure maybe he'd gotten a little too cheeky when the older man had been packing for another work trip. Daddy'd been going on too many of those lately in Dick's defense, so really it was very unfair that he wasn't allowed to cum until Daddy came back. Especially when Dick was already feeling riled up from having Jason coming to visit again. Jason didn't even have any stupid rules about whether or not he could get off. Well once Dick thought about it, technically Jason didn't have a rule about whether or not he could make Dick come if that's what he wanted to do, and Jason did really like that. So then really Dick would just be being helpful taking care of Jason until Slade got back, and how could Dick get in trouble for that?

entry.title: Pet Diary
entry.summary:
Author: CallmeSSS

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,435Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 33

Summary: Gotham has a crime rate that rivals its population count, police sirens are familiar background noise, and people learn not to ask too many questions.Dick Grayson and Tim Drake don't ask too many questions either.About the gray rabbit who sulks over bread.About the black cat who looks at them like he's plotting something.About why things in the apartment sometimes move on their own.They just think they're keeping pets.They're not entirely wrong.

entry.title: Sick for You
entry.summary:
Author: Wing1940

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,524Chapters: 2/4Kudos: 26

Summary: John lost his scholarship, but he can't tell his parents — his pride won't let him. There's only one option: find a job. As a joke, he tosses his resume into the restaurant he only goes to for a chance to catch a glimpse of the guy of his dreams. They hire him. But not as a waiter. Now he sees his "object of affection" up close every single day — and every single day, he hears him curse in Arabic. Also, John is pretty sure he's about to get diabetes.

entry.title: It Could Of Been Worse
entry.summary:
Author: Angryduckling94

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,696Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 18

Summary: Jason was no stranger to pain. He was subjected to it from the very first memory he ever had. A swinging punch aimed straight to his face before he even knew the words to express the pain it caused. Growing up he thought being in pain was normal, the standard bill of health. There was always a part of his body that hurt so he only felt normal when he was in pain. At first he thought it was wrong. Surely pain should not be the default. His body should not always ache and it could not be normal for it to always hurt when he breathed in, but the only times he ever felt a touch coming from someone had always ended with a part of him aching.

entry.title: seven days at wayne mansions
entry.summary:
Author: almostnowandthen

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,156Chapters: 1/7Kudos: 34

Summary: Dick, Jason and Tim spend a week in Wayne Mansions in Monte Carlo with Bruce. Except, they're not here on vacation; they're here to Agatha Christie the shit out of their dad, who has, unfortunately, been cloned into multiple near-indistinguishable copies by an interdimensional doppelganger, and it's up to them to find the real Bruce Wayne before time runs out. It's a good thing that they're all professional vigilantes, who would never let their reckless sexual affairs, ongoing commitment issues, or poor parental relationships get in the way of getting the job done.

entry.title: What It Sounds Like
entry.summary:
Author: UltraCaffeinatedIvy

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 52,090Chapters: 15/15Kudos: 196

Summary: Things are mostly looking up for Jason Todd. He’s finally earned a scholarship to Gotham Academy and has a place that actually feels like home. He knows it's not some kind of cosmic reward for getting through a rough past, living through Catherine's addictions, his dad up and disappearing, or any of the other shit he's had to put up with. You get dealt your hand in life, for better or —more likley— worse, and try to make the best of it. Then Dick Grayson steps in. Or Where Pamela Isley adopts Jason Todd. Enrolls him in Gotham Academy and Jason struggles being a normal teenager, having friends and, of course, falls in love with Dick Grayson in the process. A coming of age story.
